name: I Swear I Just Had it

system.description: You’re not the only thing that’s elusive. When someone is about to interact with an object (remote control, door, airplane, etc.), pat your own pocket and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
the object is no longer
there. It might be in a nearby room,
hidden behind a pile of refuse, in
someone else’s pocket, or some other
plausible place. The GM will decide.
outcomes.failure:
the object is no longer
there because it’s become lodged
in your throat. You are incapacitated
until it is removed. If it was large
enough, you may receive Harm.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you may choose one of the following:
  • An additional nearby object of your choice is moved.
  • You choose where any objects moved in this way are now located.
  • One of the moved objects disappears entirely
